languages.text: "Слабые и трусливые будут жить в грязи. Тот, кто обладает силой и волей, вознесется и будет обладать большим".
"The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."
languages.original_text: "Слабые и трусливые будут жить в грязи. Тот, кто обладает силой и волей, вознесется и будет обладать большим".

traits.locale_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Whoever possesses strength and determination will ascend and possess more."
"The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."
"Such is the lot of the weak and cowardly. Whoever possesses strength and determination will ascend and possess more."
"The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Whoever possesses strength and determination will ascend and possess more."
"The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

languages.text: 「弱者や臆病者の運命は、そうである。強さと決意を持つ者は、上り詰めて、より多くのものを手に入れる」
languages.original_text: "Such is the lot of the weak and cowardly. Whoever possesses strength and determination will ascend and possess more."

languages.text: "Zayıf ve korkaklar, pislik içinde çürüyecek. Güce ve kararlılığa sahip olanlar ise daha büyük işlere yükselecek."
languages.original_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

traits.locale_text: "Zayıf ve korkaklar, pislik içinde çürüyecek. Güce ve kararlılığa sahip olanlar ise daha büyük işlere yükselecek."

languages.text: “软弱与怯懦之辈只配在污秽中腐烂；拥有力量与意志之人，方能成就伟大事业。”
languages.original_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

traits.locale_text: “软弱与怯懦之辈只配在污秽中腐烂；拥有力量与意志之人，方能成就伟大事业。”

languages.text: "Die Schwachen und Feigen werden im Dreck verrotten. Wer über Stärke und Entschlossenheit verfügt, wird zu höheren Dingen aufsteigen."
languages.original_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

traits.locale_text: "Die Schwachen und Feigen werden im Dreck verrotten. Wer über Stärke und Entschlossenheit verfügt, wird zu höheren Dingen aufsteigen."

languages.text: « Les faibles et les lâches méritent de pourrir dans la saleté. Quiconque possède la force et la détermination s'élèvera. »
languages.original_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

traits.locale_text: « Les faibles et les lâches méritent de pourrir dans la saleté. Quiconque possède la force et la détermination s'élèvera. »

languages.text: «Los débiles y los cobardes se pudrirán entre la mugre. Los fuertes y determinados ascenderán a lo más alto».
languages.original_text: "The weak and cowardly will rot in the filth. Those who possess strength and determination will ascend to greater things."

traits.locale_text: «Los débiles y los cobardes se pudrirán entre la mugre. Los fuertes y determinados ascenderán a lo más alto».
